sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113372" key="xaraci/pontos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰραξίποντος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n113372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ploughing the sea,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ναΐα κλαῒς χ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0261.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
